title: old damage tint revamped
description: Brings back the old red tint to entities' armor when hurt. Original mod by senoe, ported to 1.21.1 by me.
body:
This mod tints any entity's armor towards red depending on how much damage they've taken. It's fully configurable, including the max amount of red percentage, inverting the redness, etc etc.

**Original mod was made by Senoe and is under the MIT license.**

**Mod ported to 1.21.1 was made by me (ChrisThaBot) and is under the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license**
Check the license in the GitHub source code to learn more about it.

## How to use
Just paste it into your mod folder, and launch the game

## How to configure
Configuration for this and almost every other mod I make is done through another mod called mod menu, which you can download [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).
Once the mod is installed, open the Mods tab, click the 3 lines next to my mod (will only appear once you hover over it), and a menu with all the configurable settings will appear. Settings will be automatically immediately applied once you click save and exit.

If you found a bug, want any other configuration option to be added, or have a recommendation for a new mod or an update to an existing one, join the discord server in my profile.
